title: Random Placement
description: Each block placed will be replaced with a completely random one!
body:
# Random Placement

**Random Placement** completely changes the block placement mechanic in Minecraft. Every block you attempt to place is replaced with a completely random block from the entire pool of blocks in the game - instead of dirt you might get a crafting table, а diamond block, an end portal frame, or anything else. **Yes, you can still beat the game!**

> **NOTE:** The mod is generally stable and works well in most cases, but may behave strangely in certain situations.

## Features

- **Randomness**: When placing any block (stone, dirt, planks, ore, etc.), it is replaced with a random block.
- **Vanilla-Friendly**: Fully compatible with vanilla Minecraft and most other mods.
- **Client & Server**: Must be installed on both the client and the server.

## Why Play?

Random Placement adds a new level of unpredictability to building and survival. The mod is ideal for players who want a fresh gameplay experience, test their adaptability, or simply play the game in a completely new way. Every block placement becomes a surprise and significantly changes the usual Minecraft experience.
